meta.title: Embed Fixer | Discord bot for fixing social media embeds
meta.description: Embed Fixer intercepts broken social links and reposts them through webhooks so embeds render correctly inside Discord. Supports all the popular platforms, trusted by 1200+ servers, and open source for self-hosting.

hero.heading: The link looked broken. The conversation shouldn’t.
hero.tagline: Embed Fixer intercepts broken social links and reposts them through webhooks so embeds render correctly inside Discord.

relay.actionValue: Delete + resend through webhook with your avatar and username
relay.resultValue: Playable media, full previews, readable content

problem.heading: Discord strips the point out of shared posts.
items: Twitter/X previews fail or load partially.
Pixiv and Instagram often hide core media.
TikTok and Reddit links lose playable videos.
Broken link forces users to leave Discord.

features.heading: Features that are well-thoughtout and actually useful.
items: Automatic fixing through webhook reposting with your username + avatar.
Manual fixings with /fix in DMs and unsupported servers.
Media extraction for supported links in a gallery-like view.
Numerous settings to customize behavior and tailor to your server’s needs.

platforms.heading: From mainstream to niche, if the embed is broken, we’ll fix it.

customization.heading: Tune almost every behavior to fit your server.
customization.body: The most powerful part about Embed Fixer is that almost every behavior can be customized or toggled to your liking, including niche features shaped by real community needs.
customization.resetNote: All settings are unique to each server. Use /reset to restore default values.

settings.label: Language
settings.description: Change the language used by the bot.

settings.label: Disable Embed Fixes for Websites
settings.description: Disable embed fixes for specific websites.

settings.label: Media Extraction Channels
settings.description: Extract images/videos from Twitter/X or Pixiv links in selected channels.

settings.label: Embed Fix Channel Blacklist
settings.description: Channels here will not receive embed fixes.

settings.label: Embed Fix Channel Whitelist
settings.description: Only selected channels receive embed fixes, and this overrides blacklist rules.

settings.label: Toggle Webhook Reply
settings.description: Toggle pinging the original author when replying via webhook.

settings.label: Disable Automatic Spoilering in NSFW Channels
settings.description: Skip automatic spoiler tags for extracted media in selected NSFW channels.

settings.label: Toggle Delete Message Reaction
settings.description: Add reactions so original authors can delete webhook messages.

settings.label: Show Post Content Channels
settings.description: Show post text content in selected channels when media extraction is enabled.

settings.label: Change Delete Message Reaction Emoji
settings.description: Choose which emoji is used for delete-by-reaction.

settings.label: Choose Embed Fix Service
settings.description: Choose the embed fix service used for different websites.

settings.label: Bot Visibility
settings.description: Choose whether links sent by other bots should also be fixed.

settings.label: Funnel to Target Channel
settings.description: Send fixed embeds and extracted media to a target channel instead of the source channel.

settings.label: Whitelist Roles
settings.description: Only users with selected roles get embed fixes. Leave empty to disable.

settings.label: Toggle Original Link Button
settings.description: Show or hide a button linking to the original post.

settings.label: Toggle Deleting Original Messages in Threads
settings.description: Delete original thread messages after sending fixed embeds through supported flow.

settings.label: Reply Instead of Delete
settings.description: Reply to the original message with the fixed embed instead of deleting and resending.

hosting.heading: Care about privacy? Open source comes to the rescue.
hosting.body: Run Embed Fixer on your own machine if you want maximum control over your data and configuration.

closing.heading: If your server shares links, this belongs in it.
closing.body: Stop leaving Discord for broken embeds. Add Embed Fixer and keep every conversation intact.
